title: Simple Sapphire Mod
body:
# Simple Sapphire Mod

The Simple Sapphire Mod (aka Sapphire Mod) introduces 2 new items and 6 new blocks into the game, along with some crafting recipes.

## Items

	•	Raw Sapphire
	•	Sapphire

## Blocks

	•	Sapphire Block
	•	Raw Sapphire Block
	•	Sapphire Ore
	•	And more…

## Features

	•	Smelting: Raw Sapphire can be smelted into Sapphire using a blast furnace, furnace, or campfire.
	•	Crafting:
	•	9 Sapphires → Block of Sapphire
	•	9 Raw Sapphires → Block of Raw Sapphire
	•	Blocks can be uncrafted back into their original materials.
	•	Reverse Smelting: A Sapphire can be unsmelted on a campfire, turning it back into Raw Sapphire.

## Links

[Check the mod out at CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-sapphire-mod)

### Note

_This mod is a test project and doesn’t have many features yet—but it’s a start!_
